commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=b82acb21a96ccd494b71e6570f9f1449fc055d8b)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an opt-in Slack `streaming.progress.nativeTaskCards` mode, Slack stream chunk rendering for progress task cards, progress id propagation, account streaming merge behavior, config/docs metadata, and focused Slack/progress tests.

PR surface: Source +568, Tests +1208, Docs +20, Generated 0. Total +1796 across 21 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding by source inspection: `buildPlanTasks` slices to the last 50 lines and then assigns idless fallback ids from the post-slice index, while plan/approval/item progress lines can be idless. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused automated repair can address the idless task-id bug, but maintainer review is still needed for compatibility risk and paired-PR handling before merge.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
